titleStmt.title: SII 5.763: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 763. (A.R. No. 199 of 1895). ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE SAME MANDAPA.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śakābdam Āyirattu muṉṉūṟṟu Eṇpattu Oṉṟiṉmeṟ cellāniṉṟa nam kumāraṉ Arikecaritevarāṉa parākkiṟamapāṇṭiyatevaṟku yāṇṭu 3 10 1 vatu Etir 8 vatu mituṉa ñāyaṟṟu Irupattumu
ṉṟān tiyatiyum pūṟuvapakṣa ttut deśa miyum(yum) putaṉkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa cotināḷ nam melaivitiyil vitaraṇaviṉotaṉperunteruvil maṭapatikaḷil tattuvappiṟakācaṉukku
muṉṉāḷ nām maṭappuṟamāka viṭṭuk kalluveṭṭik kuṭutta vakaiyil pākūril viṭṭa nilam māṟikkoṇṭu nilamāka maṭappuṟamāka viṭṭa teṉṉārināṭṭu nallūṟpaṟṟil kaṟṟucceṟṟai
ppaṟṟukkup perunāṉ kelkaiyāvatu kiḻellai Āṟṟukku meṟku teṉellai cāttāviṉ nilattukkum paṟṟukkum taṇṇampaikkum vaṭakku melellai puḷiyaṟaiyil Ellai
kkum peruvarampukkum kiḻakku vaṭaellai Āṟṟukkut teṟku Innāṉ kellaikku Uṭpaṭṭa nañcey puñcey paṭṭaṭai koṭittoṭṭam māvaṭai maravaṭai maṟṟum
nāṅ koḷḷum komuṟaipāṭukaḷum maṟṟum Eṟpeṟpaṭṭa cuvantiraṅkaḷum Ivaṉukku sarvamātyam Āka maṭapiṟa(m)māka Ācandratāram san=tatipraveśa me kaiyāṇṭukoḷ
ḷavum Ādicaṇḍeśvaran Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 5.763 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
